content.en:
"The half-step Eternal Realm God Realm has finally been reached!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

With his current strength, he far surpassed the Lord of Qinhe, even if it was the Demon Seed Linyuan, even if he fought against him one-on-one, he could defeat it.

After all, he is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and the Dao Seed Secret Technique is very powerful, and the Demon Seed Linyuan is not good except for the Eternal Demon Seed, which is not good.

"With my current strength, I should be able to easily kill an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, and the next step is to find a good Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique to solidify my Eternal Dao Seed, so as to impact the Eternal Realm God Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Soon.

The news that Ye Tian had broken through to the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm spread, and immediately many Eternal Dao Realms were shocked, and they were all extremely envious.

And with Ye Tian's breakthrough, the Endless Realm has naturally become a place that many Eternal Dao Realms yearn for, and a large number of Eternal Dao Realms have poured into here, making the Endless Realm prosperous and prosperous.

Although the Endless Kingdom is not as prosperous as the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods at the beginning, there are some signs.

this day.

Ye Tian was chatting with the remaining half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse of the Nine Extremes Alliance, the Tai Chi Dao Master, in the Endless Realm.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, your cultivation speed really shocked me, I remember that you only joined the Nine Extremes Alliance at the beginning, and you haven't cultivated to the Eternal Dao Seed yet, but you broke through to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm so quickly!"

The Tai Chi Taoist said with emotion.

"It's just a fluke to get a little chance, but when it comes to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, it is extremely difficult to solidify!" Ye Tiandao: "Without the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, relying on slow cultivation and solidification, I am afraid it will be almost difficult to solidify successfully." "

"Yes!" The Tai Chi Dao Master was extremely recognized, nodded and said, "Indeed, I have been practicing for an infinite number of years, and I have only solidified one-fifth of the Eternal Dao Seed so far, and without the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, it is indeed too difficult to complete the solidification. "

"Tai Chi Dao Master, do you know where you can obtain the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Tai Chi Daoist smiled bitterly: "If I knew, I wouldn't have to cultivate slowly." "

However, soon, the Tai Chi Dao Master said again: "But if you say that there is any hope to get the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, or go to the Realm God Realm, I have offended a very powerful half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, so I don't dare to go to the Realm God Realm Realm." Outside of the Realm God Realm, there is only one large gathering place for the Eternal Kingdom Alliance. "

"Where the Great Eternal Kingdom Alliance gathers?"

Ye Tian asked for advice on this aspect.

And the Tai Chi Dao Master also introduced: "Like us, there are only a few dozen eternal realms, and this belongs to the gathering place of the small Eternal Kingdom Alliance, and the large gathering place of the Eternal Kingdom Alliance has at least hundreds of eternal kingdoms, and even many Eternal Realm God Realms have been guarding for a long time. Of course, there are so many eternal realms gathered, and almost all of them are near some special treasure land, which can attract them. "

"Tai Chi Dao Master, do you know where the large Eternal Kingdom Alliance gathers?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The closest place to us is the Lone Star Alliance Alliance, which is near the Eternal Fire, so it has attracted many Eternal Realm Lords to open up the Eternal Kingdom here. "

"Of course, what I'm talking about is only relative to other large Eternal Kingdom Alliances, which are actually still far from us, and we still have to pass through several dangerous places. Moreover, even if he went, he didn't have much hope of obtaining the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, just a glimmer of hope. "

"Lord Ye Tianguo has a doppelganger anyway, if you are interested, you can try it, even if you fail, it can be regarded as a grind. "

Tai Chi Dao Master said.

"Okay, I'll try it when I have time!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Soon, they started talking about something else.

......

"Lone Star Nation Alliance!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian set out from the Endless Realm and rushed to the Lone Star Realm Alliance.

He first crossed the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, and then kept shuttling, crossing the long distance of the Death Zone at his blistering speed.

And after constant shuttling, he had to admit that the area of the Eternal Realm was simply terrifying!

With such a huge area, hundreds of millions of eternal kingdoms are not satisfied!

Unfortunately, it's almost all death zone.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally shuttled to another place, this place was a little dangerous for the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm - Jiudu River, Jiudu River ran through the entire Eternal Realm, so this was an indispensable and necessary way.

Even if you want to make a detour, it is useless, and you can't try to shuttle through, this river runs through time and space, no matter which time and space direction you shuttle through, you need to cross the Jiudu River.

Therefore, no matter from above the void or below the underground void, as long as you want to pass through, you will hit the Jiudu River.

The Jiudu River does not seem to be dangerous, but the water of the Jiudu River will corrode the Eternal Dao Seed and make the Eternal Dao Seed demonized, so it must be passed through quickly to avoid the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed.

Other than that.

Jiudu Hanoi also has a special demon seed creature, which is not an eternal Dao demon seed demon seed, but an innate demon seed creature, once it is entangled by these innate demon seed creatures, it is also very troublesome.

It is rumored that there are innate demon seed incarnated creatures comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm in the Jiudu River, but it is only a rumor, and the Taiji Dao Master has not seen it.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled across the Jiudu River, but he also encountered several innate demon creatures, and he killed them all without encountering any major danger.

Soon, he crossed the Jiudu River.

"Jiudu River, I can stay in it all the time, according to what the Taiji Dao Master said, there are no good things in it, and the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm are too lazy to enter here to look for resources. "

Ye Tian shook his head and gave up here.

He then continued on his way, and after a period of shuttling, he finally arrived at another dangerous place.

"Blood Doom Mountains!"

This Blood Doom Mountain Range is also an incomparably long mountain range, and there are also some dangers, the most terrifying is a creature called the Blood Doom Beast, once it is generated by the other party, it will be very unlucky, and it may even be directly demonized, even if it is not demonized, it will be unlucky for a while.

Ye Tian didn't want to be unlucky, he shuttled directly through the Blood Doom Mountain Range, and didn't dare to stay here.

Fortunately, he didn't encounter this kind of Blood Doom Beast, and soon passed through the Blood Doom Mountain Range.
